caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is speaking against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top with red and blue embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the bottom-left and bottom-right corners of the screen, a circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, moving her mouth and slightly shifting her facial expressions. Her right hand moves upward from the bottom of the frame to gesture in front of her chest, with her fingers partially open, before lowering slightly. Her gaze remains directed forward toward the viewer throughout the duration of the clip.
